## Goal
Create a second starter circuit to complement `debug-python-001`.

## Requirements
- Keep it short and beginner-friendly
- Include tests and scoring weights
- Add one clear trap/hint for commentary

## Deliverable
A new circuit YAML file with docs update if needed.
